channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The ‘simple math’ why oil prices need to rise a lot more, according to JPMorgan
AI data center backlash threatens Pennsylvania GOP incumbents in 2026 election
item.description: Pennsylvania has four competitive House races in 2026, all of which are in areas where Gov. Josh Shapiro has AI data center expansion plans.

item.title: Iran's top diplomat expected in Pakistan on Friday night to discuss peace plans: MS NOW
item.description: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.

item.title: Why Intel’s stock is on track for a historic surge after earnings
Economic calendar: Friday's data focuses on consumer sentiment
